cases.rationale: Typed props, a visible default, named slots, accessibility structure, and a stable product concept already form a useful boundary.
The document shell is a single layout boundary; its navigation and footer loops do not independently prove another reusable interface.

cases.protects_against: missing a substantial iterated product pattern
cases.rationale: The loop body owns repeated interactive and accessibility structure with a small lexical input boundary.
This is a one-off tabular report whose branches express local cell state rather than a stable reusable product concept.

cases.protects_against: rewarding every small def as encapsulation
cases.rationale: The definition mirrors another call's values and default without adding behavior, policy, slots, accessibility, or reuse evidence.
Two sibling forms repeat behavior and accessibility relationships while varying a narrow set of values.

cases.protects_against: turning one-off page arrangement into a wrapper component
cases.rationale: The route explicitly arranges existing product components and adds no reusable interface of its own.
